verifier.py line 76-77: 'COPY requirements before pip install (20 pts)' awards score += 20 when copy_req_line < pip_line

privileged_info_summary: This is a Docker Dockerfile optimization task with synthetic data. The task creates a Flask 3.0.0 application in /home/ga/build-project and requires the user to optimize a broken Dockerfile by: (1) reordering instructions so apt-get, COPY requirements.txt, and pip install all execute before copying source code; (2) creating a .dockerignore file excluding .git and __pycache__; (3) building an image tagged as 'build-project:optimized' that runs on port 5000. The verifier uses 100 total points (20+20+20 for instruction ordering, 10 for .dockerignore existence, 10 for .dockerignore content, 10 for image build success, 10 for container runtime validation). Pass threshold is 70 points.
